cpu_compare.policy: per-scheme WRF oracle fixtures compare fp32 outputs to established operational tolerances

notes: v0.17 bench_harness.py was absent in this v0.16.0 worktree; this mirrors the requested JSON fields.
fp64 and fp32-physics variants run in separate child processes to avoid JIT cache reuse across env flag toggles.
